title: PVP MAX
description: A modpack with a large collection of mods and resource packs that optimize your PVP experience!
body:
### Various mods and resource packs to help improve your Mace PvP experience!
Includes peformance mods, ping optimization, PVP overlays, texture packs, pre-added PVP servers, useful HUDs, singleplayer practice maps, and niche mods that only the best PvPers know of.

Configure mods in mod menu, make use of various resource packs, and tweak everything to your personal preference! 
______________________________________________________

![‎ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c342abd2a970cba0fde9c180a07df44d0cd7c0d9.jpeg)

- Konkrete
- Lithium

- Mas Effects
- Mod Menu

- Sodium

## Includes TheobaldTheBot PvP practice map by TheobaldTheBird
### _Biggest bird approved_

______________________________________________________

Plenty of configurable utility mods and resource packs to choose from. Whether or not you are a beginner or an experienced player, this modpack will be your best choice for Mace PVP!

**Created by salmonshot ♡**

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

# NOTICE‼️

Some of the mods in this modpack are disallowed in most tiertesting/ranked Minecraft servers. Be sure to double check in their discord server which mods are disallowed before playing with this modpack and disable said mods accordingly.
Also be careful when playing on SMPs, check their rules to see if they have a disallowed mods list.

Main disallowed mods in this modpack:
- Freelook
- Health Indicators
- Shield Status
